Package dev.omardiaa.transcript.core.util

Class Check

java.lang.Object
dev.omardiaa.transcript.core.util.Check
@NullMarked public final class Check extends Object
A utility class providing validation methods.

  • Method Summary

    Method

  • Method Details

    • check

      public static void check(boolean expression, String message, Object... messageArgs)
      Parameters:
      expression - the boolean to evaluate.
      message - the exception message format.
      messageArgs - the exception message format arguments.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the expression evaluates to false.

    • isBlank

      public static boolean isBlank(@Nullable String arg)
      Parameters:
      arg - the string to validate.
      Returns:
      true if the string is null or blank, otherwise returns false.

    • defaultIfBlank

      public static String defaultIfBlank(@Nullable String arg, String fallback)
      Parameters:
      arg - the string to validate.
      fallback - the default string to return if arg is blank.
      Returns:
      arg if the string is not blank, otherwise returns the provided fallback.

    • sizeBetween

      public static <T, C extends Collection<T>> C sizeBetween(C arg, String argName, int min, int max)
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of elements in the collection.
      C - the type of the Collection.
      Parameters:
      arg - the Collection to validate.
      argName - the name of the argument, used in the exception message.
      min - the minimum allowed size (inclusive).
      max - the maximum allowed size (inclusive).
      Returns:
      the validated collection.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the collection is null, or if its size is outside the provided range.

    • sizeMin

      public static <T, C extends Collection<T>> C sizeMin(C arg, String argName, int min)
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of elements in the collection.
      C - the type of the Collection.
      Parameters:
      arg - the Collection to validate.
      argName - the name of the argument, used in the exception message.
      min - the minimum allowed size (inclusive).
      Returns:
      the validated collection.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the collection is null, or if its size is smaller than the provided min.
